channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Alexandr Wang, Chief AI Officer at Meta, releases Muse Image to generate complex visuals via agentic pre-planning
item.description: The model is live alongside an early preview of Muse Video.
item.content:encoded:
The model is live alongside an early preview of Muse Video.

Original source: https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-image-muse-video-msl/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/6pkk4onj

  • Views: 826,638
  • Likes: 5,004
  • Bookmarks: 816
  • Quotes: 169
  • Replies: 308
  • Posts: 76

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Alexandr Wang
  • Shengjia Zhao
  • Wenhu Chen
  • 👩‍💻 Paige Bailey
2/ three things i'm excited about under the hood: - self-refinement (model improves its own output within its chain of thought — emerged during RL, not by design) - multi-reference composition (many images blended into one coherent generation) - multi-turn editing (iterate without losing coherence or starting over).

item.title: Anthropic extends Claude Fable 5 access for all paid subscribers through July 12
item.description: The extension applies automatically across all paid subscription tiers.
item.content:encoded:
The extension applies automatically across all paid subscription tiers.

Original source: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/zkz3deef

  • Views: 760,630
  • Likes: 11,357
  • Bookmarks: 555
  • Quotes: 39
  • Replies: 581
  • Posts: 28

Top authors

  • Delip Rao e/σ
  • Simon Willison
  • Yuchen Jin
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • @levelsio
ONE MORE WEEK TO ESCAPE THE UNDERCLASS

item.title: Princeton's Sayash Kapoor will join the UC Berkeley School of Information as an Assistant Professor in 2027
item.description: He is recruiting PhD students focused on frontier AI evaluation
item.content:encoded:
He is recruiting PhD students focused on frontier AI evaluation

Original source: https://cruxevals.com/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/xink08p5

  • Views: 100,338
  • Likes: 865
  • Bookmarks: 154
  • Quotes: 10
  • Replies: 116
  • Posts: 35

Top authors

  • Sanjeev Arora
  • Diyi Yang
  • Arvind Narayanan
  • rishi @ ICML
  • Niloofar ✈️ icml
Congratulations @sayashk !

item.title: OpenAI chief futurist Joshua Achiam departs the company after seven years
item.description: He plans to work on safe AGI outside frontier labs
item.content:encoded:
He plans to work on safe AGI outside frontier labs

Original source: https://www.wired.com/story/openai-chief-futurist-joshua-achiam-is-leaving-the-company/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/wantjtpb

  • Views: 233,649
  • Likes: 1,975
  • Bookmarks: 273
  • Quotes: 27
  • Replies: 140
  • Posts: 30

Top authors

  • roon
  • Logan Kilpatrick
  • Joshua Achiam
  • Kevin Weil 🇺🇸
  • Karina
Let's hope he's right.

item.title: China considers restricting foreign access to domestic frontier AI models from Alibaba and ByteDance
item.description: The proposed rules mirror US export controls on critical technology.
item.content:encoded:
The proposed rules mirror US export controls on critical technology.

Original source: https://www.reuters.com/world/beijing-is-looking-curbing-overseas-access-chinas-top-ai-models-sources-say-2026-07-07/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/nk2jm6dw

  • Views: 458,011
  • Likes: 2,649
  • Bookmarks: 485
  • Quotes: 70
  • Replies: 303
  • Posts: 24

Top authors

  • Vinod Khosla
  • Emad
  • Ethan Mollick
  • Nathan Benaich
  • kache
$39

item.title: Cloudflare opens waitlist for Monetization Gateway to charge for APIs, datasets, and MCP tools using stablecoins
item.description: The service processes payments over the open x402 protocol.
item.content:encoded:
The service processes payments over the open x402 protocol.

Original source: https://cfl.re/4eUFdt6

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/ns8t0dzg

  • Views: 1,052,971
  • Likes: 5,088
  • Bookmarks: 1,684
  • Quotes: 32
  • Replies: 177
  • Posts: 11

Top authors

  • Brian Armstrong
  • signüll
  • xuan (ɕɥɛn / sh-yen)
  • Matthew Prince 🌥
  • Rohan Paul
Finally, the web has native monetization. Ads were not the only way.

item.title: Google DeepMind releases Gemma 4 technical report, detailing multimodal open models up to 31B parameters
item.description: The 12B variant uses an encoder-free architecture for raw audio.
item.content:encoded:
The 12B variant uses an encoder-free architecture for raw audio.

Original source: http://huggingface.co/papers/2607.02770

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/0xnizees

  • Views: 136,288
  • Likes: 1,646
  • Bookmarks: 654
  • Quotes: 13
  • Replies: 58
  • Posts: 16

Top authors

  • AK
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Petar Veličković
  • Omar Sanseviero 🇫🇷 @RAISE Paris
  • Mathieu Blondel
seems like gemma 4 was trained on MUCH more tokens than the previous iteration

item.title: DeepSeek is developing a custom inference chip to reduce its reliance on Nvidia and Huawei hardware
item.description: The company's founder Liang Wenfeng has resumed hiring chip-design engineers.
item.content:encoded:
The company's founder Liang Wenfeng has resumed hiring chip-design engineers.

Original source: https://www.reuters.com/world/china/chinas-deepseek-developing-its-own-ai-chip-sources-say-2026-07-07/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/t0t51kda

  • Views: 386,101
  • Likes: 2,161
  • Bookmarks: 289
  • Quotes: 22
  • Replies: 100
  • Posts: 17

Top authors

  • kache
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Tanishq, Ph.D. at ICML
  • Andrew Curran
  • Chris Paxton
turns out he was right

item.title: Patrick O'Shaughnessy releases second Invest Like the Best podcast with Jeremy Giffon, covering Silicon Valley culture and private markets
item.description: The episode analyzes private market trends and secret Silicon Valley philosophies.
item.content:encoded:
The episode analyzes private market trends and secret Silicon Valley philosophies.

Original source: http://giffonsimulator.com

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/3s84zi7k

  • Views: 756,156
  • Likes: 1,073
  • Bookmarks: 1,776
  • Quotes: 38
  • Replies: 56
  • Posts: 8

Top authors

  • Sriram Krishnan
  • John Coogan
  • Will Manidis
  • Patrick OShaughnessy
  • Herbie Bradley
many will post today about Jeremy’s obvious traits- possibly the posting run known in history, octaves outperformance not nearly enough will get to know about what an incredible friend is, his incredible willingness to pick up the phone in the hardest moments, his sincerity

item.title: Cohere releases Cohere Transcribe Arabic, claiming top accuracy on the Open Universal Arabic ASR Leaderboard
item.description: The open-source model weights are available on Hugging Face.
item.content:encoded:
The open-source model weights are available on Hugging Face.

Original source: https://huggingface.co/CohereLabs/cohere-transcribe-arabic-07-2026

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/fjk39lgg

  • Views: 119,677
  • Likes: 1,510
  • Bookmarks: 1,091
  • Quotes: 7
  • Replies: 71
  • Posts: 8

Top authors

  • AK
  • Aidan Gomez
  • kache
  • Jay Alammar
  • Ivan Zhang
نطلق اليوم نموذج @cohere Transcribe العربي، أفضل نموذج مفتوح المصدر لتحويل الكلام العربي من الصوت إلى نص، مع مراعاة اللهجات العربية المختلفة. يتصدر معيار Open Universal Arabic ASR Leaderboard. صُمم النموذج لدعم حالات تحويل الكلام بين العربية والانجليزية، والتعرف على اللهجات المختلفة، بالإضافة إلى اللغة الانجليزية باللكنات العربية. هذا يمكّن المطورين والشركات من بناء تجارب صوتية مذهلة لعملائهم. رابط التحميل في التعليقات. نتطلع إلى سماع تجاربكم له!
